title: Employee Exit Checklist System
title_cn: 员工离职流程管理系统
description: Connect offboarding tasks, access removal, and asset returns into an enterprise workflow for controlled cross-department exits.
description_cn: 把离职任务、权限回收和资产归还串成企业业务系统，让跨部门 offboarding 更可控。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Employee Exit Checklist System: staged offboarding tasks, access revocation, and asset-return tracking. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/38-exit-checklist.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 离职流程管理系统：阶段化离职任务、权限回收与资产归还跟踪。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型：https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/38-exit-checklist.html
